title: Anti-Admin
description: "AntiAdmin" is a Minecraft plugin made to publicize admin abuse.
body:
# Anti-Admin

AntiAdmin is a plugin designed to prevent cheating with admin commands on Minecraft servers. When an admin attempts to use an "admin" command, the plugin sends a notification to a specified Discord channel via a webhook. In addition, the plugin broadcasts a message in chat to alert other players of the attempt.

## Wiki:

Our Wiki page can be found at: https://github.com/ItsMitlit/AntiAdmin/wiki

## Support:

Plugin support can be found in my discord server: https://discord.gg/yhns2dwSnc

## Videos:

Create a Youtube video on the plugin for a chance to have it featured here!

## Github:

The Github page can be found by going to this link: https://github.com/ItsMitlit/AntiAdmin

## Donations:

If you wish to donate to support the development of this plugin, Please check out my Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/mitlit
